title: The Mystery of the Missing Left Sock
text:
## The Mystery of the Missing Left Sock

Detective {person} arrived at the {adjective} laundry room with a {color} flashlight and a notebook full of {plural noun}.

The witness, a {adjective} {animal}, claimed the sock {past-tense verb} through the dryer vent at {number} o'clock.

Clue one: a trail of {adjective} lint leading toward the {place}.

Clue two: a single {object} wedged behind the {body part} of a folding chair.

The detective {past-tense verb} the hamper, {verb ending in -ing} loudly, and discovered the truth: the sock had been {verb ending in -ing} inside a {food} container the whole time.

Case closed with a {adjective} handshake and a promise to never {verb} alone again.
